mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(s.id, '') as id, COALESCE(s.name, '') as name, COALESCE(s.name_en, '') as nameEn, COALESCE(s.mailing_address, '') as mailingAddress, COALESCE(s.institution, '') as institution, COALESCE(CONCAT(sa.first_name, sa.last_name), '') as schoolAdminName, COALESCE(sa.phone, '') as schoolAdminPhone FROM signup su INNER JOIN team t ON su.team_id = t.id INNER JOIN school s ON t.school_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user sa ON s.school_admin_id = sa.id WHERE su.competition_id = #{competitionId}
SELECT DISTINCT school.school_badge_url,school.name FROM signup LEFT JOIN school on signup.school_id = school.id WHERE signup.competition_id = #{competitionId}

SELECT COALESCE(sc.id, '') as schoolId, COALESCE(us.email, '') as email, COALESCE(sc.name, '') as schoolName, COALESCE(sc.name_en, '') as schoolNameEn, COALESCE(CONCAT(uc.first_name, uc.last_name), '') as coachName, COALESCE(CONCAT(uc.first_name_en, uc.last_name_en), '') as coachNameEn, COALESCE(sc.institution, '') as institution, COALESCE(sc.taxpayer_code, '', '') as taxpayerCode, COALESCE(us.addressee, '') as mailingAddress, COALESCE(us.address_phone, '') as mailingAcceptorPhone, COALESCE(CONCAT(us.first_name, us.last_name), '') as mailignAcceptorName, COALESCE(sc.bank_card_code, '') as bankCardCode, COALESCE(sc.bank_name, '') as bankName FROM signup su INNER JOIN team t ON su.team_id = t.id INNER JOIN school sc ON t.school_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN user us ON sc.school_admin_id = us.id LEFT JOIN user uc ON t.coach_id = uc.id WHERE su.competition_id = #{competitionId}
